dailyNews.title: U.S. says Iran ports blockade "fully implemented" as Trump weighs more talks
dailyNews.description: CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper says a blockade of Iranian ports "has been fully implemented," as the U.S.-Iran dispute over control of the Strait of Hormuz continues amid a delicate ceasefire.

dailyNews.title: "The noose is getting tighter" on Iran amid blockade, Middle East expert says
dailyNews.description: The White House said more than 100 empty oil tankers are heading to ports in the U.S. to load up on American crude as the U.S. blockade on the Strait of Hormuz continues for a second day. For more, Jon Alterman, the director of the Center for Strategic and International Studies' Middle East Program, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

dailyNews.title: DOJ seeks to vacate Jan 6 convictions in sweeping move tied to Trump order
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department is taking sweeping action to erase Jan. 6 convictions tied to Oath Keepers and Proud Boys leaders in major court filings.

dailyNews.title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
dailyNews.description: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
dailyNews.description: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

dailyNews.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: DOJ moves to vacate convictions of Proud Boys, Oath Keepers from Jan. 6
dailyNews.description: The request is for those who were previously not covered by President Donald Trump’s sweeping Day 1 clemency grants.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
